name: gkwa/python-package
summary: Scaffolds a new Python package with pyproject.toml, hatchling build system, ruff linting configuration, and --version support via importlib.metadata. Use when starting a new Python package, Python CLI tool, or Python project from scratch. Trigger terms: new Python package, Python scaffold, pyproject.toml, hatchling, ruff, Python CLI, Python project setup, importlib.metadata.
